vs_customer_order_experience.name: Customer Order Experience
vs_customer_order_experience.trigger: Customer decides to order food via app, dine-in, or counter
vs_customer_order_experience.outcome: Order delivered, feedback collected, loyalty points awarded, revenue recorded

stages.name: Order Placed
stages.entryCriteria: Customer has browsed the menu and selected items via app, dine-in, or counter
stages.exitCriteria: Order submitted with confirmed pricing, Dough-Points applied, and payment processed

stages.name: Order Accepted
stages.exitCriteria: Order validated, queued, and allocated to kitchen production slot

stages.name: Order Prepared
stages.entryCriteria: Order queued and production slot allocated
stages.exitCriteria: Food prepared to quality standards, assembled, and packaged for fulfilment

stages.name: Order Dispatched
stages.entryCriteria: Order assembled and ready for handoff
stages.exitCriteria: Order dispatched to delivery driver or handed to counter/dine-in customer

stages.name: Order Delivered
stages.entryCriteria: Order in transit or ready at counter
stages.exitCriteria: Customer receives order within the 25-minute-from-oven promise

stages.name: Experience Closed
stages.exitCriteria: Feedback collected, Dough-Points awarded, revenue recorded, order closed
